title: hypericum reflexum
intro: Hypericum reflexum, also known as the shrubby St. John's Wort, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum reflexum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as its use in wound care to promote healing and prevent infection. The herbal preparations of Hypericum reflexum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, from skin conditions to mental health issues.
